product_overview: Triadak is a vacation rental management platform that brings property operations, bookings, finance, staff tasks, and guest communication into one web app. It also provides dedicated portals for owners and workers, plus public guest-facing pages for check-in and contract signing.
core_goals: Log in and access the appropriate role-based area of the app
Manage vacation rental properties and their operational details
Create, view, edit, and cancel bookings from a calendar-based workflow
Manage owners, guests, staff, and operational records in one place
Review financial performance and export owner-related reports
Sync external booking channels and communicate with guests through templates
Provide dedicated owner, worker, and guest portals for self-service access

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows users to sign in with email and password and be redirected to the correct area based on their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard for admin or staff, the owner portal dashboard for owner, or the worker tasks page for worker
Navigate to /login -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an error message

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Shows high-level property performance metrics and charts for operational review.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View KPI cards for revenue, occupancy, and active bookings -> View charts and analytics

features.name: Property Management
features.description: Lets users manage vacation rental property records, including operational details such as WiFi, access codes, images, and instructions.
user_flows: Navigate to /properties -> View the property list -> Add a new property -> Fill in property details -> Save the property -> See the new property in the list
Navigate to /properties -> View the property list -> Select an existing property -> Edit property details -> Save changes -> See the updated property information
Navigate to /properties -> View the property list -> Select a property -> Delete the property -> See the property removed from the list

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Supports booking creation and management with a list and calendar view, including status updates and inline edits.
user_flows: Navigate to /bookings -> View bookings in the list and calendar -> Create a new booking -> Fill in booking details -> Save the booking -> See the booking appear in the schedule
Navigate to /bookings -> View bookings in the list and calendar -> Select a booking -> Edit booking details inline -> Save changes -> See the updated booking information
Navigate to /bookings -> View bookings in the list and calendar -> Select a booking -> Change the booking status -> Save the status update -> See the new status reflected in the booking
Navigate to /bookings -> View bookings in the list and calendar -> Select a booking -> Cancel the booking -> See the booking marked as cancelled

features.name: Owner Management
features.description: Provides owner contact management and owner profile pages with associated properties.
user_flows: Navigate to /owners -> View the owners list -> Add a new owner -> Fill in owner details -> Save the owner -> See the owner in the list
Navigate to /owners -> View the owners list -> Select an owner -> View the owner profile -> Review linked properties -> Edit owner details -> Save changes

features.name: Finance Dashboard
features.description: Displays property-level P&L information and supports expense tracking, owner liquidations, and exports.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounting -> View P&L by property -> Review revenue and expense information
Navigate to /accounting -> View P&L by property -> Add an expense -> Save the expense -> See the updated financial totals
Navigate to /accounting -> View P&L by property -> Generate an owner liquidation -> Review the liquidation summary
Navigate to /accounting -> View finance data -> Export the report to PDF or CSV -> Download the exported file

features.name: Staff Operations
features.description: Lets users manage cleaning and maintenance staff, assign tasks, view checklists, and track payroll.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> View the staff members list -> Add a new staff member -> Fill in staff details -> Save the staff member -> See the staff member in the list
Navigate to /staff -> View the staff members list -> Assign a task to a staff member -> Review the task checklist -> Save the assignment -> See the task linked to the staff member
Navigate to /staff -> View the staff members list -> Review payroll tracking information

features.name: Channel Manager
features.description: Manages iCal channel connections and booking synchronization from external platforms.
user_flows: Navigate to /channels -> View connected channels -> Add an iCal URL for a channel -> Save the connection -> See the channel appear in the list
Navigate to /channels -> View connected channels -> Sync bookings from a channel -> Review the imported bookings

features.name: Messaging
features.description: Allows users to send guest communications through WhatsApp or SMS using predefined templates.
user_flows: Navigate to /messaging -> View message templates -> Select a booking to message -> Choose a template -> Send the message via WhatsApp or SMS -> See the sent message in history
Navigate to /messaging -> View message templates -> Review sent message history

features.name: Guest Portal
features.description: Provides guests with tokenized public access to check-in information, WiFi credentials, and house rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /guest/:token using a valid guest link -> View check-in instructions -> View WiFi credentials -> View house rules

features.name: Owner Portal
features.description: Gives property owners read-only access to their own properties, reservations, and monthly statements.
user_flows: Navigate to /portal/dashboard -> View owned properties and occupancy -> Review reservations for owned properties
Navigate to /portal/properties -> View the owner’s properties -> Review property details and occupancy information
Navigate to /portal/statements -> View monthly statements -> Download a statement as PDF or CSV

features.name: Worker Portal
features.description: Provides workers with a mobile-friendly view of assigned tasks and earnings.
user_flows: Navigate to /worker/tasks -> View the daily task list -> Open a task -> Mark checklist items complete -> See the task progress update
Navigate to /worker/tasks -> View the daily task list -> Open a task -> Report property damage -> See the damage reported as a maintenance issue
Navigate to /worker/earnings -> View monthly earnings

features.name: Contract Management
features.description: Supports rental contract creation and guest digital signing through a public tokenized link.
user_flows: Navigate to /contracts -> Create a new contract for a booking -> Generate the PDF contract -> Send the signature link to the guest
Navigate to /contract/:token using a valid contract link -> Review the contract -> Sign the contract -> See the signed confirmation

features.name: AI Chat Widget
features.description: Provides a floating support chat available across the app for asking questions and receiving AI responses.
user_flows: Open any page -> Open the chat widget -> Type a message -> Send the message -> Read the AI response
Open any page -> Open the chat widget -> Continue the conversation -> Close the chat

routes.description: Login page with email and password
WhatsApp and SMS messaging with templates
Monthly owner statements with PDF/CSV export
Public guest portal with check-in info and WiFi

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password via Supabase auth. Role-based redirect after login.
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Real-time KPI cards showing revenue, occupancy, active bookings, and charts.

features.name: Property Management
features.description: CRUD for vacation rental properties including images, WiFi, access codes, and instructions.
user_interactions: Fill property form (name, address, WiFi, access code)

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Create, view, edit and cancel bookings with visual calendar and inline editing.

features.name: Owner Management
features.description: Manage property owners with profile pages and linked properties.
user_interactions: Click on owner to view profile

features.name: Finance Dashboard
features.description: P&L engine per property, expense tracking, owner liquidations, PDF/CSV export.

features.name: Staff Operations
features.description: Manage cleaning and maintenance staff, assign tasks, track payroll and checklists.

features.name: Channel Manager
features.description: iCal sync with Airbnb, Booking.com, and Lodgify for automatic booking import.

features.name: Messaging
features.description: WhatsApp and SMS messaging with 6 automated templates for guest communication.
user_interactions: Send WhatsApp or SMS via template

features.name: Guest Portal
features.description: Public tokenized page for guests with check-in info, WiFi credentials, and house rules.

features.name: Owner Portal
features.description: Dedicated read-only portal for property owners to view their properties, bookings, and statements.

features.name: Worker Portal
features.description: Mobile-optimized portal for cleaning/maintenance staff to view and complete daily tasks.

features.name: Contract Management
features.description: Generate rental contracts as PDF and send digital signature links to guests.
user_interactions: Create new contract for a booking

features.name: AI Chat Widget
features.description: Floating chat widget on all pages for support. Connects to AgentZirox at ziro.zirox.io/api/chat with Triadak product context injected on first message.

known_limitations.issue: Billing page (/billing) exists but is hidden from navigation — monetization deferred
known_limitations.impact: Page accessible via direct URL but not linked from sidebar

known_limitations.issue: Pricing page (/pricing) exists but removed from landing page
known_limitations.impact: No public pricing shown to potential customers

known_limitations.issue: WhatsApp messaging requires Meta Business Manager configuration
known_limitations.impact: Message templates may not send until Meta templates are approved

known_limitations.issue: iCal sync depends on external calendar availability
known_limitations.impact: Sync failures if Airbnb/Booking.com iCal URLs are unavailable
